subject: [PATCH v6 7/7] locking: Add contended_release tracepoint to qrwlock

reviews.author: Steven Rostedt
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about duplicated code in the patch series. Suggested removing the actual locking logic from the traced unlock variants and only tracing the release event.

2026-05-13.patch_summary: This patch series extends the contended_release tracepoint to queued rwlocks, using an out-of-line traced unlock approach similar to that used for queued spinlocks.
